serverInfo.name: mcp-auth-proxy
serverInfo.description: Production-ready authentication, rate limiting, and audit logging for any MCP server. 38% of MCP servers have zero authentication — this fixes that in one line.
serverInfo.author: THRONE AI

tools.name: create_api_key
tools.description: Generate a new API key with optional tool permissions, rate limits, and expiry

tools.name: revoke_api_key
tools.description: Immediately disable an existing API key

tools.name: list_api_keys
tools.description: Show all active API keys and their usage statistics

tools.name: validate_request
tools.description: Check if an incoming request is authorized — the core gate used by protected MCP servers

tools.name: get_audit_log
tools.description: Retrieve the access audit trail, filterable by key, tool, and time range

tools.name: set_rate_limit
tools.description: Configure rate limits globally or per key (minute/hour/day windows)

tools.name: check_health
tools.description: Health check: uptime, request counters, blocked rate, active key count

tools.name: configure_cors
tools.description: Set allowed origins and credentials policy for HTTP-based MCP access

resources.description: Real-time dashboard: active keys, recent requests, rate limit status
Detected security threats: brute force attempts, expired keys, rotation alerts

pricing.pro: $99/month — hosted, unlimited keys, SSO, webhook alerts
pricing.enterprise: Custom — SLA, on-prem deployment, SOC2 compliance
